Uses of Class
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.openapi.OpenApiProvider.Builder

Packages that use OpenApiProvider.Builder
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.openapi
Server-side OpenAPI 3.1 emission — the OpenApiProvider SPI and the BasicOpenApiProvider default implementation that walks an RestContext and produces an OpenApi document.

  • Uses of OpenApiProvider.Builder in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.openapi

    Description

    Static creator.
    OpenApiProvider.Builder
    OpenApiProvider.Builder.fileFinder(Supplier<FileFinder> value)
    Specifies the file-finder to use for the OpenApiProvider object.
    OpenApiProvider.Builder
    OpenApiProvider.Builder.impl(OpenApiProvider value)
    Specifies an already-instantiated bean for the build() method to return.
    OpenApiProvider.Builder
    OpenApiProvider.Builder.jsonSchemaGenerator(Supplier<JsonSchemaGenerator> value)
    Specifies the JSON-schema generator to use for the OpenApiProvider object.
    OpenApiProvider.Builder
    OpenApiProvider.Builder.messages(Supplier<Messages> value)
    Specifies the messages to use for the OpenApiProvider object.
    OpenApiProvider.Builder
    OpenApiProvider.Builder.type(Class<? extends OpenApiProvider> value)
    Specifies a subclass of OpenApiProvider to create when the build() method is called.
    OpenApiProvider.Builder
    OpenApiProvider.Builder.varResolver(Supplier<VarResolver> value)
    Specifies the variable resolver to use for the OpenApiProvider object.
